MERGE (ta_midnight:ThreatActor {name:'Midnight Blizzard'})
ON CREATE SET ta_midnight.sponsor = 'Russia',
              ta_midnight.summary = 'Russian state-sponsored hacking group identified by Microsoft as responsible for breaching some Microsoft corporate email accounts and stealing emails and attachments via password spray against a legacy non-production test tenant account in Nov 2023; detected Jan 12.'
ON MATCH SET ta_midnight.sponsor = COALESCE(ta_midnight.sponsor, 'Russia'),
             ta_midnight.summary = CASE WHEN ta_midnight.summary IS NULL OR ta_midnight.summary = '' THEN 'Russian state-sponsored hacking group identified by Microsoft as responsible for breaching some Microsoft corporate email accounts and stealing emails and attachments via password spray against a legacy non-production test tenant account in Nov 2023; detected Jan 12.' ELSE ta_midnight.summary END
MERGE (ta_nobelium:ThreatActor {name:'Nobelium'})
ON CREATE SET ta_nobelium.sponsor = 'Russia',
              ta_nobelium.summary = 'Alias/name used for the Russian threat actors Microsoft assessed were responsible for the Midnight Blizzard intrusion.'
ON MATCH SET ta_nobelium.sponsor = COALESCE(ta_nobelium.sponsor, 'Russia'),
             ta_nobelium.summary = CASE WHEN ta_nobelium.summary IS NULL OR ta_nobelium.summary = '' THEN 'Alias/name used for the Russian threat actors Microsoft assessed were responsible for the Midnight Blizzard intrusion.' ELSE ta_nobelium.summary END
MERGE (ta_apt29:ThreatActor {name:'APT29'})
ON CREATE SET ta_apt29.sponsor = 'Russia',
              ta_apt29.summary = 'Alias/name used for the Russian threat actors Microsoft assessed were responsible for the Midnight Blizzard intrusion.'
ON MATCH SET ta_apt29.sponsor = COALESCE(ta_apt29.sponsor, 'Russia'),
             ta_apt29.summary = CASE WHEN ta_apt29.summary IS NULL OR ta_apt29.summary = '' THEN 'Alias/name used for the Russian threat actors Microsoft assessed were responsible for the Midnight Blizzard intrusion.' ELSE ta_apt29.summary END
MERGE (ta_midnight)-[:has_alias {date:date('2024-01-12')}]->(ta_nobelium)
MERGE (ta_midnight)-[:has_alias {date:date('2024-01-12')}]->(ta_apt29)
MERGE (victim_ms:Victim {name:'Microsoft'})
ON CREATE SET victim_ms.summary = 'Corporate email accounts (including leadership team and employees in cybersecurity and legal departments) were breached; emails and attachments were stolen.'
ON MATCH SET victim_ms.summary = CASE WHEN victim_ms.summary IS NULL OR victim_ms.summary = '' THEN 'Corporate email accounts (including leadership team and employees in cybersecurity and legal departments) were breached; emails and attachments were stolen.' ELSE victim_ms.summary END
MERGE (src_ms:Source {id:'microsoft-corporate-email-breach-midnight-blizzard'})
ON CREATE SET src_ms.publisher = 'Microsoft',
              src_ms.title = 'Microsoft warning: corporate email accounts breached; data stolen by Midnight Blizzard',
              src_ms.published_on = date('2024-01-12')
ON MATCH SET src_ms.publisher = COALESCE(src_ms.publisher, 'Microsoft'),
             src_ms.title = COALESCE(src_ms.title, 'Microsoft warning: corporate email accounts breached; data stolen by Midnight Blizzard'),
             src_ms.published_on = COALESCE(src_ms.published_on, date('2024-01-12'))
MERGE (inc_ms:Incident {id:'microsoft-midnight-blizzard-2023-11'})
ON CREATE SET inc_ms.date = date('2023-11-01'),
              inc_ms.type = 'intrusion',
              inc_ms.summary = 'Microsoft determined that Russian state-sponsored threat actors (Midnight Blizzard, also known as Nobelium/APT29) breached a legacy non-production test tenant account via password spray in Nov 2023, leading to compromise of some corporate email accounts and theft of emails and attachments.'
ON MATCH SET inc_ms.date = COALESCE(inc_ms.date, date('2023-11-01')),
             inc_ms.type = COALESCE(inc_ms.type, 'intrusion'),
             inc_ms.summary = CASE WHEN inc_ms.summary IS NULL OR inc_ms.summary = '' THEN 'Microsoft determined that Russian state-sponsored threat actors (Midnight Blizzard, also known as Nobelium/APT29) breached a legacy non-production test tenant account via password spray in Nov 2023, leading to compromise of some corporate email accounts and theft of emails and attachments.' ELSE inc_ms.summary END
MERGE (date_detect:Date {value:date('2024-01-12')})
MERGE (inc_ms)-[:occurred_on {date:date('2024-01-12')}]->(date_detect)
MERGE (inc_ms)-[:attributed_to {confidence:'high', evidence:'Microsoft investigation ultimately determined the attack was conducted by Russian threat actors known as Midnight Blizzard (more commonly Nobelium/APT29).', source_id:'microsoft-corporate-email-breach-midnight-blizzard', page:''}]->(ta_midnight)
MERGE (inc_ms)-[:targets {date:date('2023-11-01'), evidence:'Microsoft corporate email accounts were breached and data stolen.', source_id:'microsoft-corporate-email-breach-midnight-blizzard', page:''}]->(victim_ms)
MERGE (ta_midnight)-[:attacked {date:date('2023-11-01'), evidence:'Microsoft says its corporate email accounts were breached and data stolen by Midnight Blizzard.', source_id:'microsoft-corporate-email-breach-midnight-blizzard', page:''}]->(victim_ms)
MERGE (tech_pwd_spray:Technique {technique_id:'T1110.003'})
ON CREATE SET tech_pwd_spray.name = 'Password Spraying',
              tech_pwd_spray.tactic = 'Credential Access',
              tech_pwd_spray.summary = 'Attempting a small number of common passwords against many accounts to avoid lockouts and gain access.'
ON MATCH SET tech_pwd_spray.name = COALESCE(tech_pwd_spray.name, 'Password Spraying'),
             tech_pwd_spray.tactic = COALESCE(tech_pwd_spray.tactic, 'Credential Access'),
             tech_pwd_spray.summary = CASE WHEN tech_pwd_spray.summary IS NULL OR tech_pwd_spray.summary = '' THEN 'Attempting a small number of common passwords against many accounts to avoid lockouts and gain access.' ELSE tech_pwd_spray.summary END
MERGE (inc_ms)-[:used_technique {phase:'Initial Access', details:'Password spray attack used to access a legacy non-production test tenant account.', evidence:'Microsoft says the threat actors breached their systems in November 2023 when they conducted a password spray attack to access a legacy non-production test tenant account.', source_id:'microsoft-corporate-email-breach-midnight-blizzard', page:''}]->(tech_pwd_spray)
MERGE (inc_ms)-[:supported_by {page:'', quote:'Microsoft warned that some corporate email accounts were breached and data stolen by a Russian state-sponsored hacking group known as Midnight Blizzard; detected January 12; initial access in November 2023 via password spray against a legacy non-production test tenant account; emails and attachments stolen from leadership and cybersecurity/legal departments.'}]->(src_ms)
MERGE (ta_midnight)-[:supported_by {page:'', quote:'Microsoft assessed the activity as conducted by Midnight Blizzard (also known as Nobelium/APT29).'}]->(src_ms)
MERGE (victim_ms)-[:supported_by {page:'', quote:'Breach impacted Microsoft corporate email accounts, including leadership team members and employees in cybersecurity and legal departments; emails and attachments were stolen.'}]->(src_ms)
MERGE (tech_pwd_spray)-[:supported_by {page:'', quote:'Threat actors conducted a password spray attack to access a legacy non-production test tenant account.'}]->(src_ms);

MERGE (cve_2023_4969:CVE {id:'CVE-2023-4969'})
ON CREATE SET
  cve_2023_4969.summary = 'LeftoverLocals is a vulnerability affecting GPUs from AMD, Apple, Qualcomm, and Imagination Technologies that allows retrieving data from uninitialized local memory. Attackers can launch a GPU-kernel "listener" to read and dump leftover local-memory values (e.g., from a "writer" program), potentially exposing sensitive information from LLM/ML workloads such as model inputs/outputs, weights, and intermediate computations.'
ON MATCH SET
  cve_2023_4969.summary = CASE WHEN cve_2023_4969.summary IS NULL OR cve_2023_4969.summary = '' THEN 'LeftoverLocals is a vulnerability affecting GPUs from AMD, Apple, Qualcomm, and Imagination Technologies that allows retrieving data from uninitialized local memory. Attackers can launch a GPU-kernel "listener" to read and dump leftover local-memory values (e.g., from a "writer" program), potentially exposing sensitive information from LLM/ML workloads such as model inputs/outputs, weights, and intermediate computations.' ELSE cve_2023_4969.summary END

ON CREATE SET
  mit_clear.framework = 'General'
ON MATCH SET
  mit_clear.framework = CASE WHEN mit_clear.framework IS NULL OR mit_clear.framework = '' THEN 'General' ELSE mit_clear.framework END

MERGE (mit_clear)-[mitigates_cve:mitigates]->(cve_2023_4969)
ON CREATE SET
  mitigates_cve.status = 'recommended',
  mitigates_cve.observed_effectiveness = 'Clearing/initializing GPU local memory prevents recovery of leftover values via a listener kernel.',
  mitigates_cve.evidence = 'If the local memory is not cleared, an attacker can use a listener kernel to read values left behind by a writer program; clearing local memory prevents this.'
ON MATCH SET
  mitigates_cve.status = CASE WHEN mitigates_cve.status IS NULL OR mitigates_cve.status = '' THEN 'recommended' ELSE mitigates_cve.status END,
  mitigates_cve.observed_effectiveness = CASE WHEN mitigates_cve.observed_effectiveness IS NULL OR mitigates_cve.observed_effectiveness = '' THEN 'Clearing/initializing GPU local memory prevents recovery of leftover values via a listener kernel.' ELSE mitigates_cve.observed_effectiveness END,
  mitigates_cve.evidence = CASE WHEN mitigates_cve.evidence IS NULL OR mitigates_cve.evidence = '' THEN 'If the local memory is not cleared, an attacker can use a listener kernel to read values left behind by a writer program; clearing local memory prevents this.' ELSE mitigates_cve.evidence END

MERGE (cve_2023_4969)-[cve_leverages_ai:leverages]->(cap_ai)
ON CREATE SET
  cve_leverages_ai.details = 'Impacts LLM and ML processes by enabling recovery of sensitive computation data (inputs/outputs, weights, intermediates) from GPU local memory.',
  cve_leverages_ai.evidence = 'The issue enables data recovery from vulnerable GPUs, especially in the context of large language models (LLMs) and machine learning (ML) processes; recovered data can reveal model inputs, outputs, weights, and intermediate computations.'
ON MATCH SET
  cve_leverages_ai.details = CASE WHEN cve_leverages_ai.details IS NULL OR cve_leverages_ai.details = '' THEN 'Impacts LLM and ML processes by enabling recovery of sensitive computation data (inputs/outputs, weights, intermediates) from GPU local memory.' ELSE cve_leverages_ai.details END,
  cve_leverages_ai.evidence = CASE WHEN cve_leverages_ai.evidence IS NULL OR cve_leverages_ai.evidence = '' THEN 'The issue enables data recovery from vulnerable GPUs, especially in the context of large language models (LLMs) and machine learning (ML) processes; recovered data can reveal model inputs, outputs, weights, and intermediate computations.' ELSE cve_leverages_ai.evidence END
